name: The Preggomancer
description:
The Preggomancer, here for all your fertility needs.

Bridgid the preggomancer runs a quiet little shop in the next town over, you journey to her to see if what they say about her is true.

The scenario is deliberately vague enough that you could be going to see her for what ever reason you want.

Maybe you need her for a quest.

Maybe you require one of her spells for yourself.

Maybe your her new apprentice.

Or maybe you just want to see if she's really as cute as they say she is.

The Preggomancer has a number of spells she can use, and she is more than happy to give you a demonstration.

Spells: Bridgid knows a number of fertility spells.

Pregnancy Transfer; can transfer pregnancy's between people and herself.

Progression; can progress or regress hers and others pregnancy.

Multiply; can add or remove fetuses from pregnancy's.

Seal; she can bind a pregnancy preventing the mother from giving birth, the mother will still experience the pain of labor.

Labor balm; she can increase or decrease the pain of labor, or even make it pleasurable.

Merge: she can merge fetuses together to make one the size of all of them put together.
creator: Phrog_reset2
